name: Alligator Sauce Piquant-3
recipeIngredient: 30 pounds alligator meat, chopped into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a roux by cooking the vegetable oil until brown, being careful not to burn it.
2. Add onions, peppers, celery, and garlic to the roux. Cook for 10 to 20 minutes.
3. Stir in water, tomato sauce, soup, bay leaves, and sugar. Cook this mixture for approximately 1 hour, stirring every 10 minutes.
4. Add alligator meat and cook another hour.
5. Add green onions when the meat is tender and cook an additional 1/2 hour.
6. Serve 90 to 120 portions.
Festival: St. Philomena Cajun Country Festival; September 8-10, 1995
Recipe By: Cajun Country Recipes
